output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT(COUNT(*) AS ?total) WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P1066 wd:Q3531707 , wd:Q238855 .
  ?game wdt:P177 wd:Q492 .
  ?game wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?year xsd:gYear(?date) .
  FILTER(?year IN(1982 , 2006 , 2011 , 2013))
}

  ?game wdt:P177 wd:Q492 .

  ?year xsd:gYear(?date) .
  FILTER(?year IN(1982 , 2006 , 2011 , 2013))
}
